    "Visible undercut along weld toe reduces effective throat and creates stress concentration",
    "Visible porosity in weld metal indicates trapped gas and compromised fusion",
    "Incomplete fusion observed between weld metal and base metal or between passes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove defective weld metal by grinding or gouging to sound base metal",
    "Re-weld using qualified WPS and re-inspect by CWI or third-party inspector",
    "Verify welder certifications and preheat/interpass controls are followed"
  ],
  "rationale": "Undercut, porosity, and incomplete fusion are rejectable discontinuities per AWS D1.1 because they reduce weld strength and fatigue resistance. The work is rough-complete and must be repaired before acceptance.",

}
